title: Korak 49

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Trebalo bi da pozoveš print_expenses() kada prosleđuješ expenses_from_category kao argument u svoj deo elif.
Vaš poziv za print_expenses() mora da dođe nakon parametra expenses_from_category.
tests.testString: ({ test: () => assert(runPython(`_Node(_code).find_function("main").find_whiles()[0].find_bodies()[0].find_ifs()[0].find_bodies()[3].is_equivalent("category = input('Enter category to filter: ')\\nprint(f'\\\\nExpenses for {category}:')\\nexpenses_from_category = filter_expenses_by_category(expenses, category)\\nprint_expenses(expenses_from_category)")`)) })

description: Još unutar sekcije elif, izvrši rutinu expenses_from_category za poziv na print_expenses.
